items.title: Major Chase Sapphire Preferred Card Changes Live, And They’re A Mixed Bag
items.summary: The credit card space is incredibly competitive, and nowadays we see card changes with a frequency that’s much higher than in the past. Along those lines, last week Chase announced some major changes to the $95 annual fee Chase Sapphire Preferred Card.

items.title: Kudos: United MileagePlus’ Miles Pooling Feature Gets Even Better
items.summary: In 2024, the United MileagePlus program introduced a great feature, letting members pool their miles. This initially came with some major restrictions, and we’ve just seen the most limiting of those lifted. That’s something to be excited about.

items.title: Chase Sapphire Reserve Vs. Amex Platinum: Which Premium Card Wins?
items.summary: Nowadays premium cards are more popular than ever before. Two of the most well-known are the American Express Platinum Card and Chase Sapphire Reserve Card, and I know a lot of people struggle to decide which card is a better fit.
